curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff which swaps decorator ordering on 9 functions across 3 blueprint files (backups/__init__.py, backups/restore.py, browser_steps/__init__.py). The advisory mentions 13 routes across 5 files, but the patch commit only modifies these 3 source files (plus 1 test file). Sibling blueprint modules (check_proxies, imports, rss, etc.) were spot-checked and do not exhibit the same vulnerability pattern with @login_optionally_required. The pre-assigned class auth-bypass (from CWE-863) is correct — the fix reorders decorators so @blueprint.route() is outermost, ensuring the auth-wrapped function is registered.
